articles.title: Known for murder and intrigue, this Providence carriage house is on the market for $2.5m
articles.description:
With a hayloft and a creepy back story, the Barnaby Castle Carriage House will appeal to those who want something unique.

The post Known for murder and intrigue, this Providence carriage house is on the market for $2.5m appeared first on Boston.com.
